_comment: ARM64 (Graviton) Spot worker launch template. ImageId MUST be an arm64 AMI (see ami-build.md); InstanceType is c7g.xlarge (Graviton3). Create with: aws ec2 create-launch-template --launch-template-name transcoder-<env> --launch-template-data file://launch-template.json. The Lambda references it by name and overrides subnet/spot/tags at RunInstances. UserData = base64 of the per-env bootstrap (infra/ami-bootstrap-dev.sh for dev, infra/ami-bootstrap-prod.sh for prod; SSM prefix is hardcoded in each). Replace ALL <...> placeholders.
